meta.date_display: the Ninth of July, Two Thousand and Twenty-Six

game_of_the_day.headline: MUDVILLE THUNDERS PAST THE ROBINS IN THE ELEVENTH
game_of_the_day.subtitle: In which a mighty blow settles a duel of five-and-forty outs
game_of_the_day.body:
Under a copper sky the Thunders did prevail, **seven runs to six**, when the great Callahan smote the horsehide o'er the distant fence.

The standings tighten, and the faithful roar.

news.body: The wires hum with rumor that a *southpaw of renown* may yet change his colors before the deadline.

rest_of_the_card.headline: THE CINCINNATI NINE SUBDUE THE COLTS, THREE TO ONE
rest_of_the_card.body: A crisp affair decided by timely leather and a lone errant throw.

desk_note: And so the presses rest until the morrow, when fresh deeds await their chronicler.
